seedanceSegments.title: Glossy red sauce hook
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first opener: red enchilada sauce flows over rolls, then spoon-coating viscosity clarifies the sauce.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only for top-down island geometry. Use @Spoon only as the spoon shape. Use @RedEnchiladaSauceFrame as the exact brick-red glossy sauce viscosity reference. Use @RolledEnchiladaPanFrame only to preserve parallel tortilla roll ridges under the sauce. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only synchronized sauce pour, spoon drag, ceramic set-down, and soft kitchen ASMR. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.5s glossy red sauce cascades over pale tortilla rolls; 1.5-2.8s sauce settles into valleys while ridges remain visible; 2.8-4.0s spoon drags a clean glossy trail; 4.0-5.2s very quick overhead assembly context; 5.2-6.8s sauce coats the back of the spoon; 6.8-8.0s slow red ribbon drips back into the bowl. Global negatives: no final slicing, no tomato soup color, no flat lasagna sheet, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Opens on texture, then briefly re-anchors the assembly setup without becoming a neutral ingredient lineup.

seedanceSegments.title: Sizzling chicken chile filling
seedanceSegments.description: Oil shimmer, onion sizzle, chicken and green chiles, hard cut to cooked filling, beans folded in.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global kitchen identity if the shot widens. Use @InductionCloseup only for the induction cooktop and saute pan context; no flames or burner glow. Use @CookedChickenFillingFrame as the target cooked texture for opaque diced chicken, glossy onion, green chile flecks, and whole black beans. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, close food detail, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only oil shimmer, onion sizzle, steam, spatula fold, and pan scrape. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s oil shimmers in pan; 0.9-2.0s diced onions tumble and sizzle; 2.0-3.0s chicken cubes and green chiles hit the pan with steam; 3.0-4.2s quick saute stir, do not linger on raw chicken; 4.2-5.4s hard cut to cooked opaque chicken with browned edges; 5.4-6.8s black beans fold through without mashing; 6.8-8.0s finished filling close-up. Global negatives: no raw chicken lingering, no mashed bean paste, no flame, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Sauce, filling, cheese on tortilla
seedanceSegments.description: Top-down tortilla assembly: sauce smear, filling line, cheese scatter.

Use @RedEnchiladaSauceFrame for sauce color and viscosity. Use @CookedChickenFillingFrame for the chunky cooked filling texture. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro top-down assembly, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only tortilla slap, spoon smear, spoonful landing, cheese scatter. seedanceSegments.title: Rolls fill the baking dish
seedanceSegments.description: Tortilla rolls into an enchilada, slides seam-side down, and repeats into a full row.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only for top-down rolling and pan layout. Use @CharacterSheet only for Licorn hands identity. Use @PoseTopDown only for visible hands rolling from frame edges. Use @RolledEnchiladaPanFrame as the exact target topology: parallel open-ended flour tortilla cylinders in a rectangular dish, not burritos and not flat layers. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, close top-down food action, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only soft tortilla fold, ceramic slide, gentle dish tap. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.8s hands fold tortilla around the central filling into one open-ended roll; 1.8-3.0s roll slides seam-side down into the rectangular baking dish; 3.0-4.4s hard cut overhead shows multiple parallel rolls filling the dish; 4.4-5.8s final roll nestles into the last gap; 5.8-7.0s full row holds stable, pale tortillas visible. Global negatives: no burrito end folds, no flat lasagna layers, no exact count obsession, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.
